title: Change font color on invoices
excerpt: Simple request. Change font color on item lines on invoices. Currently light gray and cannot be read. The only font color on invoices should be black at a minimum. They are too hard to read.

posts.author: pettravel (Susan Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Simple request. Change font color on item lines on invoices. Currently light gray and cannot be read. The only font color on invoices should be black at a minimum. They are too hard to read.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @pettravel,

You might want to checkout Paysaro. Not only is the font clearer, but the PDF produced is higher in quality and clearer.
Also, it offers other features such as being able to select items from your board in your invoice so as not to type them individually all the time and many other features.

If you need any help with the app, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com
